title: Reports and statistics – Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Reports and statistics : Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada
Audits, program evaluations, research reports and statistics from Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC)

## Services and information
See departmental audits on areas of IRCC’s operations by the Internal Audit and Accountability Branch.
See program evaluations that provide senior management with objective, timely and evidence-based information on the results of programs, policies and initiatives.
Read analytical research reports that further our understanding of the impact of immigration on Canadian society.
Explore the yearly departmental plans, including statements of future-oriented operations.

### Statistics and open data
See statistics and data sets, including facts and figures, annual publications and the department’s data strategy.

### Departmental results reports
Find the yearly departmental results reports, including financial statements.
Read about actioning recommendations to improve the quality of our services.
Strategic Plans set the direction for the Department, identifying strategic priorities and how they will be achieved.

### Reports on Misconduct and Wrongdoing
Annual reports on founded cases of misconduct and wrongdoing at the Department.
